elements.content: 今日精选 10 条：5 项目  ·  5 技能

**🚀 热门项目**

**1.** [anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code)
      🔥+1161⭐ · Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase,…

**2.** [Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex](https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex)
      🔥+410⭐ · OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.

**3.** [luongnv89/claude-howto](https://github.com/luongnv89/claude-howto)
      🔥+270⭐ · A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents,…

**4.** [Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode](https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode)
      🔥+212⭐ · Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

**5.** [NousResearch/hermes-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent)
      📈+135⭐ · The agent that grows with you

**🧩 发现技能**

**1.** [f/prompts.chat](https://github.com/f/prompts.chat)
      ⭐156K · f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.…

**2.** [obra/superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers)
      ⭐131K · An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

**3.** [openai/openai-cookbook](https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook)
      ⭐72K · Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

**4.** [punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers](https://github.com/punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers)
      ⭐84K · A collection of MCP servers.

**5.** [anthropics/claude-cookbooks](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks)
      ⭐37K · A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
